FILED ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED ON SEPTEMBER 26, 2016. ABSTRACT RETURNED BY CONTRA COSTA COUNTY RECORDER OFFICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT MANZO, JOE DBA RILEY MILLS CABINETRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE ARON AHLAM, ASSISTANT CREDIT MANAGER FOR MACMURRAY PACIFIC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOE MANZO, DBA RILEY MILLS CABINETRY. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 7/14/16. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANZO, JOE DBA RILEY MILLS CABINETRY $2,763.68 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,948.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
